data.title: Dream Industrial REIT Announces March 2026 Monthly Distribution
data.description: Dream Industrial REIT (TSX: DIR.UN) based in Toronto revealed it will pay out a monthly distribution of 5.833 cents per unit in March 2026 (equivalent to an annual amount of 70 cents). The payout is scheduled for April 15, 2026, with unitholders recorded as of March 31, 2026, eligible to receive it. Dream Industrial REIT manages a diverse portfolio of industrial properties globally. As of December 31, 2025, the Trust held an interest in and managed a significant number of these properties.

data.title: Cosmos (ATOM) aims for $2.10 rebound by April 2026: 1-week target $1.88, medium-term $1.95-$2.10. Bullish breakout $1.96, support $1.76.
data.description: Summary of ATOM Price Predictions: In the short-term, the target price for ATOM within a week is $1.88. Looking ahead to the medium-term, over the course of one month, experts predict ATOM will fall within the $1.95 to $2.10 range. A bullish breakout is anticipated if ATOM reaches $1.96, while maintaining critical support at $1.76. For more in-depth analysis on ATOM and other cryptocurrencies, refer to Crypto Ana.

data.title: Cardinal Infrastructure Group Announces Appointment of Erik West as President of the Carolinas
data.description: On March 20, 2026, in Raleigh, North Carolina, Cardinal Infrastructure Group Inc. (NASDAQ: CDNL) revealed the selection of Erik West as President of the Carolinas region. With a history at Cardinal dating back to 2016, West brings substantial experience in the construction sector to his new role. This strategic move aims to further strengthen Cardinal's presence in the Carolinas and enhance its operations under West's leadership.

data.title: Lawn and Garden Equipment Market size to Surpass US$ 206.9 Billion by 2032, Shows New Maximize Market Research Analysis
data.description: In Pune, India, as of March 20, 2026, the market size for Lawn and Garden Equipment was recorded at USD 77.3 billion in 2025. It is expected to increase significantly to almost USD 206.9 billion by 2032, reflecting a strong Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 13.1%. The growth in the Lawn and Garden Equipment market is being driven by the increasing demand for robotic and eco-friendly equipment.

data.title: Machining Centers Market worth $30.82 billion by 2033 | MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report predicts significant growth in the machining centers market. The market, valued at USD 22.54 billion in 2026, is forecasted to reach USD 30.82 billion by 2033, showing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.6%. The report includes extensive data with 173 tables, 180 figures, and spans across 300 pages.

data.title: Semperis Takes Center Stage at RSAC 2026
data.description: Semperis, a leading company in identity-driven cyber resilience and crisis response, announced an event taking place in Hoboken, N.J. on March 20, 2026, featuring a keynote panel with Jen Easterly, Chris Inglis, Sarah Gosler, and Chase Cunningham discussing the creation of "Midnight in the War Room." This event promises to be an informative session with key figures in the cybersecurity industry.

data.title: Geographic Solutions Named as Finalist for 2026 North American Inspiring Workplaces Awards
data.description: In Palm Harbor, Florida on March 20, 2026, Geographic Solutions, a top supplier of workforce development software for state and local government agencies and the public sector, has been recognized as a finalist for the 2026 North American Inspiring award. This prestigious achievement highlights the company's dedication to innovation and excellence in serving their clients.

data.title: GENIES AND SANRIO® ANNOUNCE COLLABORATION FOR INTERACTIVE AI-ENABLED CHARACTER EXPERIENCES
data.description: A recent partnership has been established between Genies, a leading AI avatar technology company, and Sanrio®, a renowned brand known for its iconic characters. This collaboration, announced on March 20, 2026, will focus on creating innovative digital engagement platforms showcasing Sanrio characters. Genies, aiming to revolutionize interactive digital identity, will work closely with Sanrio to develop new avenues for audience interaction. This strategic alliance brings together cutting-edge technology and beloved characters, promising exciting opportunities for users.

data.title: This Top Chip-Gear Stock Has Positive Catalysts Ahead, Citi Says
data.description: Citi, an investment bank, has initiated a 90-day positive catalyst watch on Advanced Energy Industries. Despite this, the stock of AEIS experienced a decline on Friday. According to Citi, this top chip-gear stock is expected to have positive catalysts in the future.

data.title: Rhythm Surges On A New Obesity Approval; How It Edged In Where Lilly, Novo 'Have Fallen Flat'
data.description: Rhythm Pharmaceuticals experienced a significant increase in its stock price on Friday following FDA approval of its obesity drug for individuals with a rare condition that increases hunger. The approval marked a positive development for the company, with its stock surging after the announcement. This achievement by Rhythm Pharmaceuticals highlights a successful venture into a market where competitors such as Lilly and Novo have faced challenges.

data.title: This Chinese EV Brand Just Reported Its First-Ever Quarterly Profit
data.description: Despite the positive development of a first-ever quarterly profit for a Chinese EV brand, the anticipation for 2026 appears lackluster. This brand experienced a significant milestone by achieving profitability in a quarter for the first time.

data.title: This Former Highflier Nears Buy Point As Activist Investor Eyes Stock Boost
data.description: Recently, it was reported that Elliott Investment Management has purchased a substantial share in Align Technology. The investment firm's move was highlighted by Bloomberg. This acquisition has stirred interest as the company approaches a potential buy point, with an activist investor looking to boost its stock value. The details suggest a strategic maneuver by Elliott Investment Management to capitalize on the potential growth of Align Technology within the market. This development emphasizes the evolving dynamics in the financial sector, showcasing the impact of key players on stock performance.

data.title: Crypto is integral to Canada’s financial system, facing regulatory changes. Gov adopts risk-management approach in past year.
data.description: In the past year, the crypto sector has experienced several regulatory shifts, notably in Canada where the government has adopted a cautious attitude focused on risk management and prioritizing rules and guidelines.
